name: ruby-zip
title: ruby-zip
summary: Ruby module for reading and writing zip files
description:
Ruby module for reading and writing zip files
rubyzip is a ruby library for reading and writing zip (pkzip format)
files, with the restriction that only uncompressed and deflated zip
entries are supported. All this library does is handling of the zip
file format. the actual compression/decompression is handled by
zlib. zlib is accessible from ruby thanks to ruby/zlib
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-zip because Ruby module for reading and writing zip files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-zip as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-zip with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-zip --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
